svg.title: HiveApp Class Diagram - Readable Architecture View
svg.desc: Professional class diagram with domain clusters: security runtime, identity/admin, workspace/rbac, registry, plan/billing.
svg.text: HiveApp - Professional Class Diagram (Readable Domain Clusters)
Custom non-grid layout: runtime core centered, bounded contexts arranged around it for fast comprehension and traceability.

g.text: highest precedence in user role policy
creates plan templates and plan-feature composition
maintains quota configs and addOn pricing
RBAC and collaboration reference registry permission codes
features and permissions drive plan composition

svg.text: This view prioritizes readability: key classes and relationships only.
Detailed file-level coverage is preserved in the supporting diagrams in this folder.
Generated for architecture communication and implementation reviews; designed for legibility on standard laptop screens.
